title: Sales Manager Vacancy at Sunteck Realty - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Sales Manager Vacancy at Sunteck Realty - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at Sunteck Realty. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Sales Manager to strengthen our Vadodara-based team.

About Sunteck Realty:
Sunteck Realty is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Negotiate pricing, terms, and conditions on behalf of clients
• Conduct land acquisition due diligence and feasibility studies
• Liaise with banks and NBFCs for home loan assistance to customers
• Coordinate with legal teams for documentation and title verification
• Coordinate with architects, contractors, and project teams
• Prepare presentations and proposals for institutional clients
• Conduct site visits and property presentations for clients

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• CA / CMA / CFA certification
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Contract Management
• Proficiency in RERA Compliance
• Proficiency in Sales Techniques
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in Investment Analysis
• Proficiency in GIS Tools
• Proficiency in Client Relationship Management
• Proficiency in Portfolio Management

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Flexible working hours
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Vadodara, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Sunteck Realty!
